# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: 'latest',
            description: 'Docker image tag (e.g., latest, v1.0.0, dev-build-123)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REGISTRY_URL',
            defaultValue: 'registry.example.com',
            description: 'Docker registry URL (e.g., registry.example.com, gcr.io/my-project)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'my-app',
            description: 'Docker image name'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DOCKERFILE_PATH',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Path to the Dockerfile context directory'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Credentials ID for Docker registry authentication',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl',
            required: true
        )
    }

    environment {
        SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL = ''
        SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME = ''
        SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG = ''
        SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH = ''
        FULL_IMAGE_REF = ''
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate and Sanitize Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Validate and sanitize REGISTRY_URL
                    // Allow only alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, forward slashes, colons (for port)
                    def registryPattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9.\-:\/_]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$/
                    if (!params.REGISTRY_URL?.trim()) {
                        error("REGISTRY_URL parameter cannot be empty.")
                    }
                    def registryUrl = params.REGISTRY_URL.trim()
                    if (!(registryUrl ==~ registryPattern)) {
                        error("REGISTRY_URL contains invalid characters. Only alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, colons, underscores, and forward slashes are allowed: '${registryUrl}'")
                    }
                    // Prevent command injection via embedded shell metacharacters
                    if (registryUrl.contains('`') || registryUrl.contains('$(') || registryUrl.contains(';') ||
                        registryUrl.contains('&') || registryUrl.contains('|') || registryUrl.contains('\n') ||
                        registryUrl.contains('\r') || registryUrl.contains("'") || registryUrl.contains('"')) {
                        error("REGISTRY_URL contains disallowed shell metacharacters.")
                    }
                    env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL = registryUrl

                    // Validate and sanitize IMAGE_NAME
                    // Docker image names: lowercase letters, digits, separators (period, one or two underscores, one or more hyphens)
                    def imageNamePattern = /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._\-\/]*[a-z0-9]$/
                    if (!params.IMAGE_NAME?.trim()) {
                        error("IMAGE_NAME parameter cannot be empty.")
                    }
                    def imageName = params.IMAGE_NAME.trim().toLowerCase()
                    if (!(imageName ==~ imageNamePattern)) {
                        error("IMAGE_NAME contains invalid characters. Must be lowercase alphanumeric with dots, underscores, hyphens, or slashes: '${imageName}'")
                    }
                    if (imageName.contains('..') || imageName.contains('//')) {
                        error("IMAGE_NAME contains path traversal sequences.")
                    }
                    env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME = imageName

                    // Validate and sanitize IMAGE_TAG
                    // Docker tags: alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, underscores; max 128 chars
                    def tagPattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\-]{0,127}$/
                    if (!params.IMAGE_TAG?.trim()) {
                        error("IMAGE_TAG parameter cannot be empty.")
                    }
                    def imageTag = params.IMAGE_TAG.trim()
                    if (!(imageTag ==~ tagPattern)) {
                        error("IMAGE_TAG contains invalid characters or exceeds 128 characters. Only alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, and underscores are allowed: '${imageTag}'")
                    }
                    env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG = imageTag

                    // Validate and sanitize DOCKERFILE_PATH
                    // Prevent path traversal and restrict to relative paths
                    if (!params.DOCKERFILE_PATH?.trim()) {
                        error("DOCKERFILE_PATH parameter cannot be empty.")
                    }
                    def dockerfilePath = params.DOCKERFILE_PATH.trim()
                    def pathPattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._\-\/]*$/
                    if (dockerfilePath != '.' && !(dockerfilePath ==~ pathPattern)) {
                        error("DOCKERFILE_PATH contains invalid characters: '${dockerfilePath}'")
                    }
                    // Block path traversal
                    if (dockerfilePath.contains('..')) {
                        error("DOCKERFILE_PATH must not contain path traversal sequences (..).")
                    }
                    // Block absolute paths
                    if (dockerfilePath.startsWith('/') || dockerfilePath.startsWith('\\')) {
                        error("DOCKERFILE_PATH must be a relative path.")
                    }
                    env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH = dockerfilePath

                    // Construct full image reference
                    env.FULL_IMAGE_REF = "${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}:${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG}"

                    echo "Validated parameters:"
                    echo "  Registry URL:    ${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}"
                    echo "  Image Name:      ${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "  Image Tag:       ${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG}"
                    echo "  Dockerfile Path: ${env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH}"
                    echo "  Full Image Ref:  ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Dockerfile Exists') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def dockerfileLoc = "${env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH}/Dockerfile"
                    if (!fileExists(dockerfileLoc)) {
                        error("Dockerfile not found at path: ${dockerfileLoc}")
                    }
                    echo "Dockerfile found at: ${dockerfileLoc}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Use Docker Pipeline plugin's built-in methods to avoid shell injection
                    // The plugin handles argument escaping internally
                    docker.build(
                        env.FULL_IMAGE_REF,
                        "--no-cache --pull ${env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH}"
                    )
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Push Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Use withCredentials to securely handle registry credentials
                    // Credentials are never exposed in logs or environment
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS,
                        usernameVariable: 'DOCKER_REG_USER',
                        passwordVariable: 'DOCKER_REG_PASS'
                    )]) {
                        // Use --password-stdin to avoid password appearing in process list
                        sh '''
                            set +x
                            echo "${DOCKER_REG_PASS}" | docker login "${SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}" --username "${DOCKER_REG_USER}" --password-stdin
                        '''

                        // Push using Docker Pipeline plugin
                        docker.image(env.FULL_IMAGE_REF).push()

                        // Also push as 'latest' if the tag is not already 'latest'
                        if (env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG != 'latest') {
                            def latestRef = "${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}:latest"
                            sh "docker tag '${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}' '${latestRef}'"
                            docker.image(latestRef).push()
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Pushed Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS,
                        usernameVariable: 'DOCKER_REG_USER',
                        passwordVariable: 'DOCKER_REG_PASS'
                    )]) {
                        sh '''
                            set +x
                            echo "${DOCKER_REG_PASS}" | docker login "${SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}" --username "${DOCKER_REG_USER}" --password-stdin
                        '''
                        // Pull the image to verify it was pushed successfully
                        sh "docker pull '${FULL_IMAGE_REF}'"
                        echo "Successfully verified pushed image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                // Clean up local Docker images to free disk space
                sh """
                    docker rmi '${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}' || true
                    docker rmi '${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}:latest' || true
                """

                // Logout from Docker registry
                sh "docker logout '${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}' || true"

                // Clean workspace
                cleanWs()
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Docker image ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF} built and pushed successfully!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed. Please check the logs for details."
        }
    }
}
